name: Tejas Smoked Turkey Salad with Almond-Anaheim
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Smoked turkey breasts, diced into 1/2 inch pieces
2 Celery stalks, diced into 1/2 inch pieces
1/4 cup Blanched almonds, toasted and slivered
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast all peppers and chiles over an open flame until the skin blisters. Then place them in a covered bowl or plastic bag until the skin begins to loosen. Peel, seed, and cut into 1/2 inch dice.
2. Combine diced peppers, turkey, and celery in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. To make dressing, please refer to the recipe "Almond-Anaheim Dressing" in this cookbook.
4. Toss salad with dressing and adjust seasonings to your preference. Serve salad sprinkled with toasted almonds and garnished with fresh fruits.
